title: Starts with or ends with methods should be used instead of string slicing in condition expressions
description: Avoid using string slicing in condition expressions because it can lead to performance issues and potential bugs. Instead, use the startswith() or endswith() methods.
message: Avoid using string slicing in condition expressions
why_is_this_an_issue: String slicing can lead to performance issues and potential bugs

metadata.title: Starts with or ends with methods should be used instead of string slicing in condition expressions
